## Description
Please describe the changes proposed in this Pull Request and which issue they resolve.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] DevOps / CI/CD quality integration

## Quality Assurance Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style formatting of this project (`make format`).
- [ ] I have run static checks and lint rules locally (`make lint`).
- [ ] I have run the unit test suite and verified code coverage does not decrease (`make test`).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (README, Model Card, API docs).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or log errors.
